sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uuids (id UUID NOT NULL, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_uuids (id, description) VALUES (uuid(), 'First test entry');
INSERT INTO test_uuids (id, description) VALUES (uuid(), 'Second test entry');
UPDATE test_uuids SET description = 'Updated test entry' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_uuids LIMIT 1);
SELECT * FROM test_uuids WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM test_uuids ORDER BY uuid() LIMIT 1);
